arts.ttl: Preview: Braga vs. Gil Vicente - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Primeira Liga clash between Braga and Gil Vicente, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Matheus Nunes: Why Man City cannot win Champions League with makeshift right-back who has "no defensive instincts at all"
arts.sum: Should Man City have replaced Kyle Walker in January? Can they win the Champions League with Matheus Nunes at right-back? Citizens expert Steven McInerney shares his views to Sports Mole.
